Content-Type: text/plain
This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] input[type=button] showPicker() doesn't throw when readonly
  assert_false: User activation is consumed for non-readonly showPicker() call expected false got true

  assert_false: User activation is consumed for non-readonly showPicker() call expected false got true

  assert_false: User activation is consumed for non-readonly showPicker() call expected false got true

  assert_false: User activation is consumed for non-readonly showPicker() call expected false got true
